description_long: This is a classic school desk and chair set, featuring a rectangular wooden desktop with rounded edges and a matching wooden seat and backrest. The desk has a metal frame with four slender, tubular legs and a modesty panel beneath the desktop, as well as an open storage compartment for books or supplies. The chair is similarly constructed with a metal frame and wooden seat and back, attached with visible screws. The wood surfaces have a medium brown finish, while the metal parts are painted a dark gray. The overall design is utilitarian and durable, typical of furniture found in educational settings. The desk and chair are separate but designed to be used together.
description: A classic school desk and chair set with a brown wooden top and seat, supported by a sturdy gray metal frame. The desk features an open storage compartment beneath the desktop.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open storage compartment under the desk and the chair positioned behind it.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the backrest of the chair and the side of the desk's storage compartment.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the back of the chair and the right side of the desk, with the storage compartment partially visible.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the front edge of the desk, the open compartment, and the chair's seat and backrest.
attribute_orientation: The side with the open storage compartment and unobstructed desktop is intended to face the user, with the chair positioned behind the desk for seating.
attribute_usage_context: student writing and study desk in a classroom setting
